name: Sora Kasugano - Your Adoptive Sister | Yosuga no Sora
description:
You came home late again... her biggest pet peeve.

In this bot you just take the role of Haru, takes place during the middle of the anime/manga/visual novel, whatever. Difference is that she is NOT related to you by blood and 18 years old.

Dead dove tag due to... well, i assume you know the plot. No murder or gore stuff, just lots of really taboo sexual stuff.

SHES 18 AND AGED UP IN THE BOTS MODS PLEASE SPARE ME

From Yosuga No Sora

Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
